creator: vladimir.chukharev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 148129
Patch

Citing Jussi Malinen:

Robot 2.8.6 is a minor release with lots of enhancements and bug fixes [1].  The most important new features are: 

• Support for more general merging results with Rebot [2]. 
• Improved logfiles with collapse all [3], new icons [4], and elapsed time on header row [5]. 
• Recommendations for not found variables [6] and keywords [7].
...

QA:
My RF tests continue to work with the update. None of the following commands expose any problems.

 portlint -C /usr/ports/devel/py-robotframework
 make -C /usr/ports/devel/py-robotframework -D DEVELOPER=yes check-plist stage-qa clean
 ( cd /usr/ports/devel/py-robotframework ; sudo port test )
 sudo portmaster devel/py-robotframework
